title: Baxter Details Progress Toward Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Priorities in Annual Corporate Responsibility Report
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $BAX--Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX), a global medtech leader, today released its 2021 Corporate Responsibility Report, demonstrating how the company is progressing toward its 2030 Corporate Responsibility Commitment and Goals. The report highlights the continued progress Baxter has made to advance environmental, social and governance (ESG) performance across its operations and philanthropic programs. “Baxter's unwavering dedication to responsible corporate cit

title: Baxter to Host Second-Quarter 2022 Financial Results Conference Call for Investors
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX), a global medtech leader, will host a conference call to discuss its second-quarter 2022 financial results on Thursday, July 28, 2022 at 7:30 a.m. Central Time. To participate in this conference call please follow this link https://conferencingportals.com/event/EmxweYhQ to pre-register for the call and receive the call information. This call is also being webcast and can be accessed through Baxter's website at www.baxter.com

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Baxter (BAX) Stock For Now
text: Investors continue to be optimistic about Baxter (BAX) due to its strong product portfolio and regulatory clearances.

title: Baxter to Present at the Goldman Sachs 43rd Annual Global Healthcare Conference
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX), a global medtech leader, will present at the Goldman Sachs 43rd Annual Global Healthcare Conference on Tuesday, June 14, 2022. José (Joe) Almeida, Baxter's chairman and chief executive officer, is scheduled to present at 10:40 a.m. Pacific Time. The live webcast of Baxter's presentation can be accessed at www.baxter.com and will be available for replay through June 13, 2023. About Baxter Every day, millions of patients and
